description: Completed tuning cache signature and row count per stage.
sql: SELECT CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS name, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS stage_num_td, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS algorithm_version, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS source_signature, CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS tuning_rows, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS processed_at, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS status FROM datastore:merged_fleet_stream_customer_full_v2 WHERE 1 = 0
